channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-14 to 2026-07-20
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 5 INTERESTING, 2 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.2 sec). Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 5 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec). Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 74°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-20: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 7 kt WNW, water 75°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 5 INTERESTING, 2 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 5 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 74°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 7 kt WNW, water 75°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
